description: 悠買 (buysg) — 股東會紀念品自動下單 CLI（讀 MOPS、多帳戶零股下單、Excel 報表）
notes: 首次使用：buysg login 登入零股悠帳號 → 放本人券商憑證到 %USERPROFILE%\scoop\persist\buysg\home\certificates\ → buysg doctor 檢查。
券商 SDK 於安裝時由券商官網自動下載（非由我們提供或轉發）。
post_install: Write-Host 'buysg: 下載 Python 3.12.7（nuget 完整版）...'
if ((Get-FileHash "$dir\py.zip" -Algorithm SHA256).Hash -ne '149DD298E0B7A82250CA019471770FFF079874088A4E8501CA20922D7DF3A6AC') { throw 'python nupkg hash mismatch' }
Write-Host 'buysg: 從券商官網下載 SDK（不轉散布）...'

foreach ($u in @('https://www.esunsec.com.tw/trading-platforms/api-trading/binary-packages/esun_trade-2.2.0-cp37-abi3-win_amd64.whl','https://www.esunsec.com.tw/trading-platforms/api-trading/binary-packages/esun_marketdata-2.2.0-cp37-abi3-win_amd64.whl','https://www.fbs.com.tw/TradeAPI_SDK/fubon_binary/fubon_neo-2.0.1-cp37-abi3-win_amd64.zip')) { $n = Split-Path $u -Leaf; Invoke-WebRequest $u -OutFile "$wh\$n" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; if ($n -like '*.zip') { Expand-Archive "$wh\$n" $wh -Force -ErrorAction Stop } }
if (-not (Test-Path "$dir\venv\Scripts\buysg.exe")) { throw 'buysg 進入點未建立，安裝失敗' }
Write-Host 'buysg 安裝完成。先跑：buysg login 登入零股悠帳號，再 buysg doctor 檢查環境。'
